# Tier LLC

## Identity
- **Vendor name:** Tier LLC
- **DBA / common name:** Tier Installation / Tier Commercial Installation & Services
- **Address:** 544 W 32nd Street, Charlotte, NC 28206
- **Website:** tierinstallation.com
- **General inbox:** info@tierinstallation.com
- **Main phone:** 980-240-0662
- **Service area:** NC, SC, VA, TN, GA (confirmed by Cass Wilkins, email, 2026-07-08)
- **Services offered:** Office/commercial furniture install, knockdown/relocate, tech install support

### Rate data point (single project quote — not a published rate card)

Signed Greensboro (project 7578) proposal, dated 2026-07-09: office/conference furniture
swap — relocate and install existing furniture, plus clean-up, during normal business
hours. **$1,075.00 flat.** Do not treat this as a standing rate until more data points exist.
